creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 165092
Update audio/libsidplayfp to version 1.8.3

Newer version of libsidplayfp has been released.

In addition, use OPTIONS_GROUP instead of OPTIONS_MULTI
for making a group of optimizing options, so that user
can select nothing of them like as the original product
allows to do such.
